prompt:
Scene:
A polished Prompt Atlas production image for the theme Ancient Book Restoration. Build a finished, gallery-ready visual demonstration rather than a generic mood board. The setting should be specific, coherent, and immediately readable, with lighting, viewpoint, and environment chosen to support the core visual challenge.

Subject:
Create core demonstration as a self-contained image that demonstrates Ancient Book Restoration. The main subject should occupy the visual center of gravity, with clear supporting details around it. Use the theme's capability focus: recognizable real-world knowledge and cultural detail, before-after editing logic and preserved constraints.

Important details:
High production value, precise composition, clean hierarchy, crop-safe framing, and no unrelated filler. Make the visual evidence of the theme visible at thumbnail size and still rewarding in close inspection. Use believable materials, intentional color contrast, and consistent design language across all elements.

Use case:
Independent single-image study in Prompt Atlas, intended for a gallery card and detail modal. It should prove the theme direction before deeper series production.

Constraints:
No watermark, no real brand logo, no private data, no temporary URLs, no task ids, no messy extra panels, no unreadable clutter, no accidental duplicate main subjects, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Core Demonstration
description: Core Demonstration is an independent study for the Ancient Book Restoration theme.

generation.runner_notes: Independent prompted image; no reference URL required.
